form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 10 at this track Mdn on April 3 over 1100m, 4 len behind Nistirith carrying 56kg at $21. The start before that did the work up front then tired 5th of 11 at Albany Mdn on March 8 over 1100m, slow going 1.5 len behind Tawaaj carrying 58kg at $31. Top prospects.

Previously second-up 6th of 12 at Esperance Mdn on December 5 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Dainty Rose with 54kg at $4.80. Fitter but looks a forlorn hope.

form.formComment: Comes off a 42 day let-up. At the latest run 7th of 10 at Esperance Mdn on March 1 over 1100m, 4 len behind Written Sin carrying 56kg at $9.50. The run before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Esperance Mdn on February 20 over 1300m, 1.3 len behind Three Ay Em carrying 56kg at $8. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign when last of 9 at this track Mdn October 19 over 1200m, 12 len behind Slippery Fish carrying 53kg at $21. Previously first up; ninth of 12 at this track Mdn September 7 over 1300m, 12 len behind Ripper Rupert with 56kg at $151. May need the run.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last outing 4th of 10 at this track Mdn on April 3 over 1100m, 2.75 len behind Nistirith with 56kg at $10. At only start last preparation ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 9 at this track Mdn on October 19 over 1200m, 2 len behind Slippery Fish carrying 56kg at $14. Wasn't far away fresh and can feature in the finish again.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly making debut by War Chant out of Pasadena Girl. Sixth over 1000m in a Belmont Park trial on October 27. After that eighth over 1000m in a Belmont Park trial on March 30. Wouldn't surprise to see her in the finish on debut.

form.formComment: First starter by Gingerbread Man out of Lady Valorem. Has a total of three trials leading in today's debut. Sibling to a smart one who has won seven races. Can play a leading role on debut for the local stable.
